name: JPMorgan Private Bank and Wealth Management
scope_note: Covers J.P. Morgan Wealth Management (branch-based advisors, mass affluent to HNW) and J.P. Morgan Private Bank (UHNW, $10M+ clients) only. Excludes JPMorgan Chase consumer banking, commercial banking, investment banking, and J.P. Morgan Asset Management divisions.
ai_strategy_summary: The largest technology investment in banking — $18 billion annual tech budget with 450+ AI use cases in production, expanding to 1,000 by 2026. Gross sales increased 20% YoY (2023-2024), with GenAI-driven tools cited as helping teams focus more effectively on high-impact client work — though no specific tool was credited for the growth. The wealth management AI centrepiece is Connect Coach — a next-best-action engine for advisors (95% faster information retrieval, scaling from 4,600 Private Bank advisors to 17,000 across Chase Wealth Management by year-end). CEO Mary Callahan Erdoes publicly credited AI for enabling personalised advice to every client simultaneously during April 2025 market volatility — the first major bank CEO to make that specific claim. At the 2025 Investor Day, AWM disclosed $2.7 billion in investment spend (largest ever), $6 trillion in entrusted assets, $1 trillion in new client assets over two years, and 3.4x advisor productivity improvement.
headline_metric: $18B annual tech spend; 450+ AI use cases; 20% gross sales growth (GenAI cited as contributor); 95% faster info retrieval; $2.7B AWM investment spend (largest ever)
headline_initiative: Connect Coach — next-best-action engine scaling from 4,600 Private Bank to 17,000 advisors across Chase Wealth Management

advisor_productivity.headline: Connect Coach: 95% faster info retrieval, scaling from 4,600 to 17,000 advisors, 3.4x productivity improvement
advisor_productivity.detail: Connect Coach is JPMorgan's core wealth management AI tool — a next-best-action engine that anticipates personalised actions for each advisor's client base. Originally deployed to 4,600 Private Bank advisors, it launched to Kristin Lemkau's 7,600 Chase Wealth Management employees and will reach 17,000 by year-end. The tool reduces information retrieval by 95% and has driven 3.4x advisor productivity improvement. New hires (25-year-olds) are now as productive as mid-career (30-35) hires. During April 2025 market turmoil, Connect Coach pre-populated real-time data enabling personalised responses at scale. Harvard Business School wrote a case study on JPMorgan's AI deployment — it is now the required final case for first-year MBA students. Total wealth advisor force: 9,600 across Private Bank + Chase Wealth Management.
evidence: 95% faster information retrieval via Connect Coach (Reuters, May 2025)
20% gross sales growth YoY (2023-2024) — GenAI tools cited as helping teams focus on high-impact client work; no specific tool credited (Reuters, May 2025)
4,600 Private Bank → launched to 7,600 CWM → 17,000 by year-end (CEO Erdoes, Investor Day transcript)
3.4x advisor productivity improvement; 25-year-old new hires as productive as 30-35 mid-career hires (Investor Day transcript)
9,600 total wealth advisors across Private Bank + Chase Wealth Management (Investor Day transcript)
Harvard Business School required final case study on JPMorgan AI deployment (CEO Erdoes, Investor Day transcript)
April 2025 market volatility: AI pre-populated client data for personalised responses (CEO Erdoes, Reuters)
450+ AI use cases in production, expanding to 1,000 (Klover.ai analysis of JPMorgan disclosures)
$2.7B AWM investment spend (largest ever), $6T entrusted assets, $1T new client assets over two years (Investor Day transcript)

client_personalization.headline: AI pre-populates real-time market data + individual client investment preferences during live volatility events
client_personalization.detail: During April 2025 market volatility, JPMorgan's AI tools analysed trading patterns, anticipated client questions, and pre-populated real-time data alongside each client's historical investment preferences, enabling advisors to respond with personalised guidance at scale. CEO Mary Callahan Erdoes publicly credited AI for enabling advice to every client simultaneously — the first major bank CEO to make that specific claim under real stress conditions.
evidence: CEO Erdoes credited AI for personalised advice during April 2025 volatility (Reuters, May 2025)
AI pre-populated real-time market data + client preferences (The AI Insider coverage)
Advisors responded with customised plans during intraday market swings (Complete AI Training analysis)

investment_portfolio.headline: Connect Coach surfaces next-best-action investment recommendations personalised to each advisor's client base
investment_portfolio.detail: Connect Coach anticipates next-best-action for wealth advisors, personalised to each client situation. Examples from Investor Day: when 48 stocks hit all-time highs, it identifies clients who haven't donated to their alma mater and tees up DAF workflows. When stocks hit lows, it prompts advisors to call board members about GRATs for future appreciation. After a morning meeting on European equities, it instantly shows which clients lack European exposure with fund fact sheets and sample talking points.
evidence: Connect Coach next-best-action: DAF for all-time highs, GRAT for lows, European equity matching (CEO Erdoes, Investor Day transcript)
After morning meeting, Connect Coach shows who doesn't have European stocks + fund fact sheets + sample emails (Investor Day transcript)
55ip brought in $25B assets last year, $380B customised portfolio flywheel — top 3 (Investor Day transcript)
14M trades/day average → 28M in April; $260B → $500B daily trading in April, no system stress (Investor Day transcript)
